strengths: 16+ years full-stack experience exceeding requirement; strong primary stack mastery (TypeScript, Node.js, React) demonstrated across recent roles
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, directly matching stated required skill
Proven large-scale system design and optimization; strong architecture and DevOps background with AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite strong Node.js background
PostgreSQL and MySQL experience not documented; only MongoDB clearly shown
Testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not mentioned despite TDD methodology referenced

key_factors.factor: Documented database and testing framework gaps

response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds 6+ year requirement with 16+ years full-stack development and strong mastery of primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) across recent roles. Current position at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure, matching a stated required skill. Primary concerns are undocumented Nest.js, PostgreSQL, MySQL, and testing framework (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) experience, though depth of engineering background suggests these may be documentation gaps rather than skill deficits.
